CustomField.description: How many (if any) SME subcontractors are working on your Wave 3 project? Please use your best approximation, and provide any further relevant details. If you don't know, please state so in the free text box.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: How many (if any) SME subcontractors are working on your Wave 3 project? Please use your best approximation, and provide any further relevant details. If you don't know, please state so in the free text box.
CustomField.label: XSME Subcontractors
